subcodes.first_line: God beareth witness that there is none other God but Him, and He Who hath appeared in truth is verily the Dayspring of bounty and the Dawning-Place of justice [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی ظهر بالحق انه لمطلع الفضل و مشرق العدل به
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @station of the Manifestation of God, @praise and encouragement, @consolation and comfort
